name: ruby-ecdsa
title: ruby-ecdsa
summary: ECDSA implementation almost entirely in pure Ruby
description:
ECDSA implementation almost entirely in pure Ruby
This package contains the Elliptic Curve Digital Signature Algorithm (ECDSA)
almost entirely in pure Ruby. This gem does use OpenSSL but it only uses it to
decode and encode ASN1 strings for ECDSA signatures. All cryptographic
calculations are done in pure Ruby.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-ecdsa because ECDSA implementation almost entirely in pure Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-ecdsa as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-ecdsa with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-ecdsa --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
